current.summary: Massive Add Wizard UX polish session — 20+ commits fixing nav buttons, table columns, drill-in, risk indicators, scroll, hooks/MCP support, native content discovery, and preFilterType bug.

activeWork.description: Add Wizard UX Polish — fixing remaining discovery bug for content-type-specific adds
activeWork.progress: All 5 original UX polish changes implemented + 20 bug fixes. One remaining bug: preFilterType discovery starts but gets stuck at 'Scanning...' — the async discovery cmd is now returned from advanceFromSource but the result message (addDiscoveryDoneMsg) may not be routing back to the wizard correctly.

git.lastCommit: 0be34fb fix: preFilterType discovery never started — advanceFromSource returns cmd

recentDecisions: Risk box at bottom of review table with fixed 4-line height to prevent jank
Per-item risk display (not aggregated) — shows only selected item's risks, max 5
Risk box is non-interactive — removed from Tab cycle
Column order: Name → Risk → Type → Status
Dynamic name column width (capped at 50% of available space)
MCP/hook drill-in extracts relevant JSON section instead of showing full settings file
Hook/MCP risk indicators computed from actual config (command/url/env fields)
stdio-only MCP servers without env vars get no risk indicators
Native content discovery fallback for local paths without syllago structure
advanceFromSource returns tea.Cmd so preFilterType discovery actually starts
Context-aware Add button labels per tab
Breadcrumb navigation disabled during Execute step
Add More button on execute done state
nextSteps: 1. FIX CRITICAL BUG: preFilterType discovery gets stuck at 'Scanning...' — advanceFromSource now returns startDiscoveryCmd() but the async result (addDiscoveryDoneMsg) may not route back. Check app_update.go routing for addDiscoveryDoneMsg when wizard is in discovery state. The Library 'Add content' flow works (goes through Type step first), but content-page flows skip Type and the discovery cmd result doesn't arrive.
2. Test all content-type add wizards (Skills, Agents, MCP, Rules, Hooks, Commands) from their respective pages
3. Remaining UX items: symlink handling for PAI system content (follow symlinks, warn about source, skip items pointing back to syllago library)
5. 134 uncommitted files are mostly deleted bundled content from content/ dir — may need to be committed or .gitignored

context.notes: The 134 uncommitted files are mostly from Holden deleting the bundled content in content/ (example skills, rules, MCP, etc. that shipped with the repo). The actual TUI code changes are all committed and pushed. The key files for the remaining bug: add_wizard.go (advanceFromSource returns tea.Cmd), add_wizard_update.go (callers now return cmd), app_update.go (addDiscoveryDoneMsg routing). The test TestDiscoverFromLocalPath_NativeSkills passes — the discovery function finds all 12 skills. The issue is in the async message routing, not in the discovery logic. Two pre-existing test failures in cmd/syllago (TestDoctorCheckRegistries_WithConfig, TestFindProjectRootFallbackWarning) are unrelated.
